title: Forget Tombstone Receipt
description: Tombstone receipt envelope returned by the second-brain.forget.v1 capability. v1 is archive-only -- no destructive purge.

correlation_id.description: Echoes the correlation_id from the originating request.

target_id.description: Echoes the target_id from the originating request.

status.description: Tombstone outcome. 'tombstoned' means the entry is archived and excluded from future think results.
